Class User

java.lang.Object
user.User
Direct Known Subclasses:
Employee, Manager, RegisteredClient, UnregisteredClient
public abstract class User extends Object
It defines the user of the app

    • totalId

      public static int totalId
      ID counter for the users

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(UserType type, String pwd, String userName, String actualID, boolean asc)
      Creates a new user
      Parameters:
      type - the user's user type
      pwd - , the password of the user
      userName - , the username of the user
      actualID - , the ID of the user
      asc - the results' order in the search

    • User

      public User(UserType type, String pwd, String userName, boolean asc)
      Creates a new user, but for other classes
      Parameters:
      type - the user's user type
      pwd - , the password of the user
      userName - , the username of the user
      asc - the results' order in the search

    • User

      public User()
      Creates a new user without id, password or username

  • Method Details

    • changePassword

      public void changePassword(String newPwd)
      Changes the password of the user
      Parameters:
      newPwd - , the password of the user

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Obtains the password of the user
      Returns:
      the user's password

    • getSearcher

      public Searcher getSearcher()
      Obtains the user's searcher
      Returns:
      the user's searcher

    • getUserName

      public String getUserName()
      Gets the username of the user
      Returns:
      the user's name

    • changeSearchOrder

      public void changeSearchOrder(boolean bool)
      Changes the order of the search (ascendant or descendant)
      Parameters:
      bool - , determines the order (ascendant or descendant) on which the products appear

    • addPriceFilter

      public void addPriceFilter(double min, double max)
      Adds a new price filter to the user
      Parameters:
      min - , minimum price to search
      max - , maximum price to search

    • addPunctuationFilter

      public void addPunctuationFilter(int min, int max)
      Adds a new punctuation filter to the user
      Parameters:
      min - , minimum punctuation to search
      max - , maximum punctuation to search

    • getType

      public UserType getType()
      It gets the user's user type
      Returns:
      the user's user type

      It gets the user's actual ID (String)

      the user's id
